overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian waterfront promenade during an intense orange sandstorm. The player walks past abandoned commercial buildings and vehicles, ascends stairs to an upper walkway lined with palm trees, and approaches a massive distant structure through heavy atmospheric haze. High-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned commercial street with overgrown weeds and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the Los Osos building and abandoned vehicles, exploring the deserted storm-swept street

entered.detail: large commercial building with illuminated 'LOS OSOS' signage on the facade
red and white striped construction barricade blocking part of the street
derelict cars covered in dust and overgrown with weeds
red metal scaffolding structure attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a ground-level abandoned commercial street during an intense orange sandstorm. The camera moves forward past the Los Osos building on the right, with red construction barriers on the left and abandoned vehicles scattered ahead. Metal scaffolding clings to the building as overgrown vegetation covers the asphalt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to upper waterfront promenade

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete stairs alongside the building
reaches top of stairs, transitioning from enclosed street to open upper promenade

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs alongside the building, transitioning from ground level to the elevated walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with debris scattered on the steps leading upward
metal safety railing along the edge of the upper promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete stairway alongside the building, leaving the abandoned street below. The Los Osos building and its scaffolding shift to the left as the camera climbs. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens onto an elevated promenade with a metal railing overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking stormy waters

events.description: massive offshore structure becomes visible through the orange haze in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade past scattered debris and sitting figures, observing the stormy waterfront and distant structures

notable_agents.action: figure sitting on the ground near the railing looking out at the stormy water

entered.detail: tall palm trees swaying in the wind along the promenade edge
abandoned furniture, trash bags, and construction materials littering the walkway
massive futuristic building or ship visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated waterfront promenade with palm trees swaying in the storm. The camera passes sitting figures and scattered debris including abandoned furniture. Through the thick orange haze, a massive offshore structure becomes visible in the distance, looming over the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront approach to massive offshore installation

events.description: camera turns slightly to reveal more of the railing and water view before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade toward the massive distant structure, passing more debris and palm trees

notable_agents.action: group of figures standing near the base of the massive offshore structure

entered.detail: tall utility pole with electrical transformers and cables

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the storm-swept promenade with the massive offshore structure growing larger and more defined through the haze. The camera passes utility poles and more scattered debris while approaching distant figures standing near the base of the colossal structure. The Los Osos building fades into the orange distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate ground-level street up to an elevated waterfront promenade during an intense orange sandstorm. It begins by moving forward past the Los Osos building and red construction barriers, navigating through abandoned vehicles and overgrown vegetation on the asphalt. As the camera ascends a concrete stairway, the street falls away and the building shifts to the left before the view opens onto a high promenade lined with a metal railing. The scene then expands along the storm-swept walkway, passing swaying palm trees and scattered furniture as a massive offshore structure begins to loom through the thick orange haze. Finally, the camera continues toward the horizon, passing utility poles and distant figures while the colossal structure grows more defined and the city buildings fade into the atmospheric distance.
